title: Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions:
Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions!
